events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: unauthorized field water addition to boost slump is a **fail** at **high risk** — it bypasses ACI 301's controls on water-cementitious ratio and can silently degrade strength/durability. Immediate actions: stop placement, reject/quarantine the adulterated load, verify w/cm and re-test slump/air/temp under QC authorization before any resumption, and have the engineer of record evaluate any already-placed concrete from that load.
